general.title: General
general.description: Application wide settings can be configured here.
general.languageHelper: Change the language used across the application interface

commandPalette.title: Command Palette
commandPalette.description: Configure how the search-first command palette (/ or ⌘K) behaves.
commandPalette.autoOpenHelper: Open the top result automatically when exactly one tool matches what you've typed.
commandPalette.startScreenHelper: What "/" renders with nothing typed yet.
commandPalette.alwaysTilesHelper: Force the touch tile grid even when a keyboard is present.
commandPalette.recentsHelper: Tools opened and pivoted values, one feed, last 8 — not configurable.

accessGate.title: Access Token Required
accessGate.description: This Corvid instance requires an access token to continue.
accessGate.whereToFindStep1: Printed once in the backend startup logs (docker compose logs backend).
accessGate.whereToFindStep2: Saved on the server at data/.access_token.
accessGate.whereToFindStep3: If you've already unlocked this app in another browser on this device, open Settings → About there to copy it.
accessGate.lostTokenBody: Delete data/.access_token on the server and restart the backend - a new token is generated and printed to the logs. This immediately invalidates the old token, signing out every browser that was using it, not just this one.
